text.tspan: ClassFormatError → Pass 1 | VerifyError → Pass 2/3 | NoSuchFieldError/NoSuchMethodError → Pass 4
ExceptionInInitializerError → Initialization | NoClassDefFoundError → 이후 모든 접근 (영구 erroneous)
